CustomField.description: Charge Rate per unit of utilization (such as Flight Hours - FH, Flight Cycles - FC, etc.), which is calculated to a precision of two decimal places. This effectively overrides the Base Rate (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Charge Rate per unit of utilization (such as Flight Hours - FH, Flight Cycles - FC, etc.), which is calculated to a precision of two decimal places. This effectively overrides the Base Rate (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.label: Rate
